title: Tasty Thai Egg Roll Wrappers Pad Thai
description: A quick-fix Thai dish featuring egg roll wrappers and a low-glycemic friendly form of pad thai, served in a lazy susan spinner vessel.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the shrimp from the wok and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the wok.
Add the tamarind paste, palm sugar, fish sauce, salt, and pepper to the wok and stir to combine.
Add the rice noodles to the wok and stir to combine with the sauce.
Add the bean sprouts and cooked shrimp back to the wok and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Meanwhile, prepare the egg roll wrappers by cutting them into thin strips.
Add the egg roll wrapper strips to the wok and stir to combine with the pad thai mixture.
Cook for an additional 1 minute, stirring constantly.
